name: graph
summary: Nodes + edges. Directed/Undirected. Weighted/Unweighted. BFS/DFS traversal. Shortest path, cycle detection.

facts.text: adjacency list: O(V+E) space — thường dùng
adjacency matrix: O(V²) space — dense graph
DAG: Directed Acyclic Graph — topological sort, dependency
tree là special graph: connected, acyclic, 1 root
